last_local_evidence.result: 6 MHC FN/norm-weight merge PTO-DSL configs emitted nonempty C++ with local PTOAS; 6 validation cases materialized.

kernels.name: normalize_weight
kernels.notes: PTO-DSL uses row_sum, tadds with TileKernels 1e-20 denominator sentinel, row_expand, and row_expand_div. Generated validation assets include host runner and NumPy golden/compare for a deterministic runtime shape.

kernels.name: transpose
kernels.notes: Dynamic rows/cols port using PTO TTrans tiles. Runtime shape grid mirrors TileKernels deterministic correctness rows in the manifest. fp8_e4m3 remains compile-only/deferred.

kernels.name: batched_transpose
kernels.notes: Dynamic batches/rows/cols port using PTO TTrans tiles. Generated validation assets include host runner and NumPy golden/compare for one deterministic TileKernels-grid shape.

kernels.name: fused_weight
kernels.notes: Ports the bf16 weight_hidden * weight_embed path with f32 accumulation/output over the TileKernels hidden-size grid.

kernels.name: expand_to_mhc_fwd
kernels.notes: Forward copy expands bf16 input rows across the MHC axis for the deterministic n0/n1/hidden manifest grid.

kernels.name: expand_to_mhc_bwd
kernels.notes: Backward path reduces bf16 gradients across the MHC axis using f32 tile accumulation before conversion back to bf16.

kernels.name: topk_gate
kernels.notes: PTO-DSL follows the PTO-ISA manual TopK structure: tfillpad_expand with PadValue::Min pads exact TileKernels expert counts to PTO sort widths, sort32 attaches a uint32 index vector, mrgsort merges, and gather extracts index lanes. PTO-Gym validation currently uses uint32 output indices; TileKernels torch API returns int64.

kernels.name: topk_sum_and_topk_group_idx
kernels.notes: Grouped TopK now uses PTO sort/pad/gather primitives twice: first inside each group to sum the top expert scores, then over per-group sums to select group indices. PTO-Gym validation currently uses uint32 group indices because PTO sort exposes uint32 index lanes; TileKernels' public torch API returns int64.

kernels.name: top2_sum_gate
kernels.notes: Deferred: remaining TopK-family gate after sort-based topk_gate and grouped topk_sum ports.

kernels.name: group_count
kernels.notes: Correctness-first scalar PTO scan avoids TileLang atomics by using one block and scanning per expert. This is real validation code, not the final high-throughput algorithm.

kernels.name: aux_fi
kernels.notes: Correctness-first scalar PTO scan computes per-expert counts and scales by num_experts / (num_tokens * num_aux_topk).

kernels.name: mask_indices_by_tp
kernels.notes: Scalar PTO remaps int64 expert indices for the current TP rank and preserves TileKernels -1 sentinel behavior.

kernels.name: inplace_unique_group_indices
kernels.notes: Correctness-first per-token scalar scan removes later duplicate non-negative group ids by writing TileKernels' -1 sentinel.

kernels.name: get_fused_mapping
kernels.notes: Deferred: scalar scan prototype hit PTOAS unsupported data-dependent scalar stores into pos_to_* mapping arrays; needs PTO tile/scatter design or backend support.

kernels.name: expand_to_fused
kernels.notes: Deferred.

kernels.name: expand_to_fused_with_sf
kernels.notes: Deferred: scale-factor behavior depends on packed low-precision format support.

kernels.name: reduce_fused
kernels.notes: Deferred.

kernels.name: per_token_cast
kernels.notes: Deferred: quant dtype and scale policy required.

kernels.name: per_block_cast
kernels.notes: Deferred: block-scale layout and FP8/FP4 packing policy required.

kernels.name: per_channel_cast
kernels.notes: Deferred.

kernels.name: per_channel_cast_fused
kernels.notes: Deferred.

kernels.name: per_channel_cast_and_transpose
kernels.notes: Deferred: fused quant+transpose needs byte-pattern compare.

kernels.name: swiglu_forward_and_per_token_cast
kernels.notes: Deferred: fused quant path and dtype packing not in this wave.

kernels.name: swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast
kernels.notes: Deferred: fused quant path and dtype packing not in this wave.

kernels.name: swiglu_forward_and_per_channel_cast_and_transpose
kernels.notes: Deferred: fused quant+transpose path and byte-pattern compare required.

kernels.name: cast_back
kernels.notes: Deferred.

kernels.name: per_token_cast_back
kernels.notes: Deferred.

kernels.name: per_block_cast_lossless
kernels.notes: Deferred: exact packed-lossless semantics need byte-level host compare.

kernels.name: e5m6_paths
kernels.notes: Deferred: PTO dtype support/policy still needs confirmation.

kernels.name: engram_hash
kernels.notes: Scalar/token-parallel int hash over n-gram token ids with int64 multipliers, per-layer vocab modulo, and offset addition.

kernels.name: engram_gate_fwd
kernels.notes: Fixed-hidden forward save path using 1024-wide row tiles, f32 RMS reductions, signed-sqrt sigmoid gating, bf16 output, and saved dot/gate/rstd intermediates.

kernels.name: engram_gate_bwd
kernels.notes: Correctness-first backward computes grad_x, grad_k, grad_v, and per-persistent-block grad_w_partial with regular tile reductions and stores.

kernels.name: grad_w_reduce
kernels.notes: Tile f32 reduction over persistent partial gradients, bf16-to-f32 weight conversion, and in-place accumulation into hidden/embed weight gradients.

kernels.name: sinkhorn_normalize_fwd
kernels.notes: Tile f32 Sinkhorn forward for n0={1,2}, n1={1,1024,4096}; uses PTO texp, row/column reductions, row/column expansion, and tile division.

kernels.name: sinkhorn_normalize_bwd
kernels.notes: Tile f32 Sinkhorn backward for n0={1,2}, n1={1,1024,4096}; stores forward stage tiles and applies row/column normalization adjoints in reverse.

kernels.name: pre_split_mixes_fwd
kernels.notes: Tile f32 forward splits 24-wide mix rows into pre/post/comb outputs using PTO tile sigmoid and row arithmetic.

kernels.name: pre_split_mixes_bwd
kernels.notes: Correctness-first single-block backward writes input gradients plus one partial 3-value scale gradient and 24-value base-gradient row.

kernels.name: pre_apply_mix_fwd
kernels.notes: bf16 MHC pre-apply forward computes the hidden-axis weighted sum over mhc lanes with f32 accumulation.

kernels.name: pre_apply_mix_bwd
kernels.notes: Correctness-first bf16 backward updates x_grad and writes per-token f32 mix_grad via hidden-axis dot products.

kernels.name: pre_norm_fn_fwd
kernels.notes: Baseline forward without optional norm-weight merge; computes RMS-normalized residual/FN projection with f32 output.

kernels.name: fn_normw_merge_fwd
kernels.notes: Optional norm-weight merge for pre_norm_fn; computes out_fn = fn * normw.

kernels.name: fn_normw_merge_bwd
kernels.notes: Optional norm-weight merge backward; accumulates fn_grad and normw_grad.

kernels.name: mhc_pre_big_fuse
kernels.notes: Deferred: fused path should wait for verified smaller stages.

kernels.name: head_compute_mix_fwd
kernels.notes: Tile f32 sigmoid head mix forward over num_tokens={0,4001}; uses PTO texp/trecip instead of scalar math.exp.

kernels.name: head_compute_mix_bwd
kernels.notes: Correctness-first single-block backward computes input gradient plus one partial scale gradient and one partial base-gradient row.

kernels.name: post_fwd
kernels.notes: bf16 MHC post forward combines post-layer x and comb-residual branches with f32 accumulation.

kernels.name: post_bwd
kernels.notes: Correctness-first bf16 backward writes gradients for x, residual, post_layer_mix, and comb_res_mix.

kernels.name: mhc_multilayer_recompute
kernels.notes: Deferred.

gaps: Generated validation cases include host allocation, launch, golden-data emission, and output comparison for deterministic runtime shapes per compiled variant; local validation_compile is still blocked by missing Ascend/CANN tooling.
Atomics-heavy MoE counters and mapping kernels need PTO-native algorithms instead of direct TileLang warp/atomic translation.
topk_gate and grouped top-k sum now use PTO sort primitives; top2_sum_gate and int64 index widening remain open before the MoE TopK family is complete.
FP8/FP4/E5M6 and fused quant paths need packed-format policy plus byte-pattern host comparison before correctness can be claimed.
